choices.text: Solved double-spending without trusted third party. PoW + chained timestamps + longest-chain rule. Probabilistic finality after confirmations. Trustless digital cash.

questions.explanation: PoW + timestamps + longest chain = trustless ledger.

choices.text: UTXO (Unspent Transaction Output). No account balances. Wallet shows sum of spendable UTXOs. Spending consumes inputs, creates outputs. Stateless; parallelizable; better privacy than account-based.

questions.explanation: UTXO model: balance = sum of outputs.

choices.text: BIP39 mnemonic (12-24 words) encodes random entropy → BIP32 HD derivation → unlimited addresses. Backup mnemonic offline (metal plate). Lose mnemonic = lose funds forever; no recovery.

questions.explanation: Mnemonic = root of all wallet addresses.

choices.text: Difficulty auto-adjusts every 2,016 blocks (~2 weeks). Targets 10-min average. Faster blocks → difficulty up; slower → down. Max swing 4× per cycle. Adapts to any hash rate.

Block reward halves every 4 years; → 0 by 2140. Tx fees must dominate eventually. Current ~1-10% fees; must grow with usage + BTC value. Open question for sustainability — but by then BTC value likely much higher.

questions.explanation: Fees replace reward as it decays to zero.
